footer.description: Your ultimate destination for buying luxury and reliable cars in Turkey and Oman with competitive prices and flexible financing plans.

hero.title: Yolman oto – Car Sales and Financing in Turkey and Oman
hero.subtitle: Buy reliable cars at competitive prices with flexible financing plans
hero.description: We provide integrated solutions including: cash car sales, car financing up to 24 months, lease-to-own options with clear terms, imported cars, and auctions

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Yolman oto?
whyChooseUs.description: We believe buying a car should be a clear and well-informed decision. That’s why we provide a transparent experience built on detailed inspections and clear contracts to ensure your peace of mind at every step.

points.title: Full Transparency in Vehicle Information
points.text: We provide accurate and complete details about each vehicle, including specifications, technical condition, and usage history when available.

points.title: Clear Disclosure of Paint & Replacements
points.text: Any repainting or part replacements are clearly disclosed with no hidden information.

points.title: Comprehensive Technical Inspection
points.text: Every vehicle undergoes a thorough technical inspection to ensure safety and quality before being offered for sale.

points.title: Clear & Fair Contracts
points.text: We use straightforward contracts that protect the rights of all parties without hidden terms.

points.title: Expertise in Turkey & Oman Markets
points.text: Deep understanding of customer needs and market dynamics in Istanbul, Muscat, and other major cities.

points.title: Professional After-Sales Support
points.text: We maintain ongoing communication and support even after the purchase is completed.

whyChooseUs.footerNote: Our goal is for you to buy your car with confidence and complete peace of mind

intro.title: About Us | Car Sales Company in Turkey & Oman
intro.description: Yolman oto operates in the automotive market in Turkey and the Sultanate of Oman, focusing on delivering a safe and professional car-buying experience built on transparency and trust. We aim to simplify the car purchasing process by providing accurate information, comprehensive inspections, and flexible options that suit different needs and budgets.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To become one of the leading car sales companies in Turkey and Oman by delivering a transparent and secure purchasing experience that builds long-term customer trust.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To provide carefully selected vehicles with clear data, thorough inspections, and contracts that protect all parties, while offering flexible solutions including cash purchases, financing, and lease-to-own options.

values.title: Our Values
items: Transparency in presenting full vehicle details
Professionalism in customer service and communication
Customer satisfaction as a top priority

whyUs.title: Why Yolman oto?
points: Trusted car sales company with a strong reputation
Wide variety of options for different customer needs
Complete transparency in vehicle data and condition
Extensive experience in Turkey and Oman markets

markets.title: Markets We Operate In
countries: Sultanate of Oman (Muscat and other regions)
markets.description: We serve customers in both markets with a deep understanding of local demand, regulations, and purchasing procedures in each country.
